user_query: I am planning a trip to Japan and I want to know the current exchange rate between Bitcoin and Ethereum. Also, can you provide me with the supported countries for tax calculations? Additionally, I would like to check the yield for AGNC and the next dividend payout date for AAPL.

TaskList.description: Fetch the current exchange rate between Bitcoin and Ethereum.
Fetch the supported countries for tax calculations.
Check the next dividend payout date for AAPL.
